_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill it in. config.json is git-ignored and stays on your machine.
_sessionid: Your instagram.com 'sessionid' cookie value (NOT your password). See the README for how to copy it from your browser.
_targets: Accounts to track. 'self' means your own account. Add usernames you want to monitor, e.g. ["self", "some_account"].
_known_ids: Optional username -> numeric id map. Skips the rate-limited profile lookup. Leave empty to resolve automatically.
_safety: Conservative defaults to reduce rate-limit risk.
